data.current_description: Obtain OAuth 2.0 access token using JWT assertion.
data.summary_suggestion: Generate OAuth 2.0 access token via JWT assertion
data.description_suggestion: Generates an OAuth 2.0 access token using JWT assertion for API authentication. Requires a valid JWT assertion in the request body. Returns a TokenResponse containing the access token, token type, expiration time, and refresh token. The returned token should be used in the Authorization header for subsequent API requests.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about inputs (JWT assertion requirement), outputs (token response structure), and usage context. Enhanced version clarifies authentication flow, expected request format, response contents, and how the token should be used by AI agents.

message: Operation 'adduser' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too generic. Enhanced version specifies what input is expected (CreateUserRequest schema), what is returned (UserResponse with user ID), and clarifies the side effect (user becomes immediately active). This helps AI agents understand the operation's full scope and consequences.

data.current_description: Add users to MeritHub organization account.
data.summary_suggestion: Create and add user to organization
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new user and adds them to the MeritHub organization account. Accepts a CreateUserRequest containing user details (name, email, role, etc.). Returns a UserResponse with the newly created user's information including assigned user ID. The user is immediately active and can access the virtual classroom based on their assigned role and permissions.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic. Enhanced version specifies what input is expected (CreateUserRequest schema), what is returned (UserResponse with user ID), and clarifies the side effect (user becomes immediately active). This helps AI agents understand the operation's full scope and consequences.

message: Operation 'updateuser' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Enhanced version clarifies the request schema, response format, path parameter requirement, and partial update capability for better AI agent decision-making.

data.summary_suggestion: Update user profile and account information
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing user's profile and account information in the MeritHub organization. Accepts an UpdateUserRequest with modifiable user fields. Requires the userId path parameter to identify the target user. Returns the updated UserResponse object. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified, existing values for omitted fields are preserved.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about inputs (UpdateUserRequest), outputs (UserResponse), and important behavior (partial update support). message: Operation 'deleteuser' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description mentions irreversibility but lacks context about access revocation, response format, and data retention. Enhanced version clarifies the immediate effects (access revocation), expected response, and data handling to help AI agents understand the full impact of this destructive operation.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently removes a user from the MeritHub organization account. Requires the userId path parameter to identify the user to delete. This action is irreversible and will immediately revoke the user's access to all virtual classroom resources and sessions. Returns a success confirmation response. All user data and enrollment records are retained for audit purposes.
data.reasoning: Original description mentions irreversibility but lacks context about access revocation, response format, and data retention. Enhanced version clarifies the immediate effects (access revocation), expected response, and data handling to help AI agents understand the full impact of this destructive operation.

message: Operation 'scheduleclass' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is vague about input requirements and output format. Enhanced version specifies the ScheduleClassRequest schema, clarifies the instructorId parameter requirement, explains the ClassResponse return value, and indicates the class becomes available for enrollment immediately.

data.current_description: Create oneTime or permanent live class sessions.
data.summary_suggestion: Schedule one-time or recurring live class session
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new live class session in the virtual classroom. Accepts a ScheduleClassRequest specifying class details, schedule type (one-time or recurring), timing, instructor assignments, and other configuration parameters. Requires the instructorId path parameter to identify the primary instructor. Returns a ClassResponse containing the created class ID, schedule details, and session information. The class is immediately available for student enrollment.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about input requirements and output format. Enhanced version specifies the ScheduleClassRequest schema, clarifies the instructorId parameter requirement, explains the ClassResponse return value, and indicates the class becomes available for enrollment immediately.

message: Operation 'editclass' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too brief and lacks critical details. Enhanced version clarifies the EditClassRequest schema, specifies the classId requirement, explains the constraint about class type immutability, indicates the response format, and clarifies when changes take effect for AI agent planning.

data.description_suggestion: Modifies settings and configuration for an existing live class session. Accepts an EditClassRequest with updatable class parameters (schedule, title, description, instructor assignments, etc.). Requires the classId path parameter to identify the target class. The class type (one-time vs. recurring) cannot be changed after creation. Returns the updated ClassResponse. Changes take effect immediately for future class sessions.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and lacks critical details. Enhanced version clarifies the EditClassRequest schema, specifies the classId requirement, explains the constraint about class type immutability, indicates the response format, and clarifies when changes take effect for AI agent planning.

message: Operation 'deleteclass' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is vague about scope and consequences. Enhanced version clarifies the classId requirement, specifies what gets deleted (enrollments, recordings, materials), indicates immediate effects (cancellation, student notification), and explains the irreversible nature for comprehensive AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Remove class and all associated data.
data.summary_suggestion: Permanently delete class and associated data
data.description_suggestion: Permanently removes a live class session and all associated data from the MeritHub virtual classroom. Requires the classId path parameter to identify the class to delete. This action is irreversible and will immediately cancel the class, remove all student enrollments, and delete session recordings and materials. Returns a success confirmation response. Enrolled students will be notified of the cancellation.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about scope and consequences. Enhanced version clarifies the classId requirement, specifies what gets deleted (enrollments, recordings, materials), indicates immediate effects (cancellation, student notification), and explains the irreversible nature for comprehensive AI agent understanding.
